name: wheelwise
description: A product and engineering decision skill pack for turning ideas into a full Chinese Markdown product brief with visuals, demos, and execution plans.

interface.shortDescription: Generate Chinese Markdown reports with decisions, visuals, demos, and execution plans.
interface.longDescription: WheelWise is a multi-skill product decision pack that structures raw ideas, selects the delivery surface, reviews feasibility and risk, evaluates existing solutions, creates visual briefs and interactive demo specs, and produces one complete Chinese Markdown report file with a Codex-ready execution plan.
defaultPrompt: Use $using-wheelwise to evaluate this product idea.
Use $using-wheelwise to decide what to build, buy, reuse, fork, or reference.
Use $using-wheelwise to create wheelwise-report.md for this idea.
